PowerShell($auth = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cloud.colibricloud.com/oauth/authenticate?client_id=b18ccb00-544b-4899-848c-e266582b6b67" -Headers @{"Content-Type"="application/json"}; $token = $auth.access_token; Write-Host "Token OK: $\($token.Substring\(0,20\)\)..."; $vendas = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cloud.colibricloud.com/api/v1/itemvenda?dtinicio=2026-05-19&dtfim=2026-05-19&store_id=1679098433798&page=1&per_page=10" -Headers @{"Authorization"="Bearer $token"; "Content-Type"="application/json"}; Write-Host "Total itens: $\($vendas.totalItens\)"; Write-Host "Total paginas: $\($vendas.totalPaginas\)"; $vendas.data | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.descricao\) | qty=$\($_.quantidade\) | cancelado=$\($_.cancelado\) | ts=$\($_.timestampLancamento\)" })

PowerShell($auth = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cloud.colibricloud.com/oauth/authenticate?client_id=b18ccb00-544b-4899-848c-e266582b6b67" -Headers @{"Content-Type"="application/json"}; $token = $auth.access_token; foreach \($dia in @\("2026-05-16","2026-05-17","2026-05-18"\)\) { $v = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cloud.colibricloud.com/api/v1/itemvenda?dtinicio=$dia&dtfim=$dia&store_id=1679098433798&page=1&per_page=1" -Headers @{"Authorization"="Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "=== $dia === Total: $\($v.totalItens\) itens" })
